title: Screenshot Organisation
description: Puts screenshots in folders according to the world save or server you are playing on.
body: Have you ever found yourself drowning in a sea of unorganised Minecraft screenshots? The Screenshot Organisation mod is here to rescue you! This handy mod takes the chaos out of your screenshot collection by categorising them into folders, neatly arranged according to the world save or server you are playing on. With this mod, you can bid farewell to the endless scrolling and searching for that perfect Minecraft moment captured in a screenshot. Say hello to a more organised and efficient way of managing your precious memories in Minecraft. To change the folder your screenshots go into, download the [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) mod. Icon attribution: Folder icons created by dmitri13 - Flaticon Screenshot icons created by Freepik - Flaticon
